name: example-webgl-voronoi-cells
title: Voronoi Cells
description: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: a living Voronoi network with drifting feature points, palette-keyed cells and glowing boundaries; move the cursor to push the cells.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：活的 Voronoi 网络，漂移特征点、按调色板着色的细胞与发光边界；移动光标推挤细胞。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 自包含 WebGL2 主視覺：活的 Voronoi 網絡，漂移特徵點、按調色板著色的細胞與發光邊界；移動游標推擠細胞。
description_i18n.en: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: a living Voronoi network with drifting feature points, palette-keyed cells and glowing boundaries; move the cursor to push the cells.

query.en: Build a self-contained WebGL2 hero of a living Voronoi network with drifting points, palette-keyed cells and glowing edges, cursor-reactive.
query.zh-CN: 构建自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：活的 Voronoi 网络，漂移点、调色细胞与发光边界，光标可推挤。
